_comment: Synthetic facilities coordination meeting recaps + transcript excerpts + action items for the Calder Tower chiller event. action_items carry their own ids, owners (people ids), due dates, status. MTG-003 is restricted (vendor commercial).

meetings.title: Calder Tower Facilities Coordination Call
meetings.recap: Latest coordination call (10-JUN) on the Calder Tower chiller failure. The call DECIDED: accept the suspected low-refrigerant leak as working cause, authorise Coolflow to pressure-test, braze the leak, recharge, and soak-test; deploy interim spot-cooling to floors 18-24 within 24 hours; and target cooling restored by 26-JUN. Tenant-notification commitment to be confirmed by leadership. Actions assigned to the named owners below.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Derek Owens: 'It's a low-refrigerant lockout — fix the leak before we trust the compressor.' Sam Whitford: 'We can be soak-verified by 26-JUN if parts land tomorrow.' Marco Reyes: 'Approved. Aisha, stand up interim spot-cooling on 18-24 today. Raj, hold the tenant note until Helen approves the commitment.'

action_items.text: Pressure-test, braze the suction-line leak, recharge and soak-test Chiller-2
Deploy interim spot-cooling to floors 18-24 within 24 hours
Confirm tenant-notification commitment with leadership approval

meetings.title: Calder Tower Facilities Coordination Call
meetings.recap: Prior coordination call (08-JUN). The Chiller-2 trip was reported and the building put on interim measures. No confirmed cause yet; Derek assigned to analyse and Coolflow to be engaged. No restoration date committed at this point.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Janet Cole: 'Chiller-2 tripped overnight, building is warming on the high floors.' Derek Owens: 'Give me the fault log; I'll have a cause by tomorrow.'

action_items.text: Analyse Chiller-2 fault log and propose working cause

meetings.title: Coolflow Vendor Commercial Review (SLA / penalties)
meetings.recap: Vendor commercial review with procurement and the director. Reviewed Coolflow SLA response targets and service-credit penalties relevant to the Calder Tower exposure. (Restricted: vendor commercial / penalty terms.)
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Mei Lin: 'Coolflow's SLA credit applies if restoration exceeds the agreed window.' Helen Stamos: 'Then 26-JUN is the line; document the exposure.'

action_items.text: Document Coolflow SLA credit exposure for the Calder Tower event
